feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PickListsService_UpdateReleasedAllocation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m facing an issue while working with SAP Business One Service Layer when trying to update bin allocations for child items in a Sales BOM.

Here’s the scenario:

  • I have a Sales Order with a mix of Sales BOM (parent items) and child items (inventory-managed).

  • I’m creating and updating PickLists using the Service Layer.

  • For parent items in the Sales BOM, bin allocations are not applicable as they are non-inventory items. However, for child items, I’m attempting to allocate bins.

Here’s what I’ve noticed:

  1. I’m using a JSON structure to update the PickLists, including the DocumentLinesBinAllocations array for child items.

  2. While some bins are successfully updated, a few child items fail to reflect the correct bin allocations.

  3. PreviouslyReleasedQuantity for all lines is correctly set, and I’ve verified the BinAbsEntry values exist and are active in the system.

Here’s an example of the update JSON I’m sending:

{
    "PickList": {
        "Absoluteentry": 107486,
        "ObjectType": "156",
        "PickListsLines": [
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 0,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 0,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 0,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 1,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 2,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 2,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 2,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 3,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 3,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 3,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 4,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 4,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 4,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 6,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 6,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 5,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 7,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 7,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            }
        ],
        "Status": "ps_Released",
        "UseBaseUnits": "tNO"
    }
}

Despite this structure, the bin allocations fail for some child items. The LineNumber and BaseLineNumber mappings to the Sales Order lines have been double-checked and seem correct.

What I’ve Tried:

  1. Calling PickListsService_UpdateReleasedAllocation before sending the update JSON to ensure released quantities align.

  2. Adding and removing optional fields like AllowNegativeQuantity and SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine.

  3. Verifying the bin statuses and quantities in the OBIN table.

Questions:

  1. Has anyone encountered a similar issue where child items in a Sales BOM do not update correctly in picklists?

  2. Are there any specific configurations or prerequisites I should verify for child items in picklists?

  3. Could this be related to how the Service Layer processes Sales BOM structures or the relationship between parent and child items?

Any insights or advice would be greatly appreciated! 😊

Best regards,

entry.title: MRP - Forecast query
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are executing the MRP. While executing we have defined the forecast for the Item.
We want to generate requirement based on only Forecast and without considering the Sales Order and Blanket Agreement.

We have unchecked the Sales Order and Blanket Agreement from the wizard option but still the requirement is not generating.

Following is checked from our end.

1.We have also unchecked "Consumed Forecast" Option from General setting.
2. Items planning MRP related setting is already updated.
3. No stock available for item in warehouse.

 

Regards,

Krishna Verma

entry.title: Custom Tab
entry.content: I have created a custom tab in business partner master data.  This is visible for all users apart from two.  Why would this be the case please and how do we get it visible for these users?

entry.title: How to change Control Account in SAP Business One During Outgoing Payment based on AP Invoices
entry.content:
Dears,

Wish all have a good day

Please, help in this case

I was posted AP Invoices with Old Control Account on BP Master Data

After this i was changed Control Account to new control account in BP Master Data and make this old control account inactive

Issue is when make outgoing payment based on Old AP Invoices with old control account

i can't because old control account is inactive and if i converted old control account to active

Transactions of outgoing payment go to old control account and i want transactions go to new control account

 

Please, advice or workaround

Many Thanks

entry.title: web client sap b1 public view or Analysis for all user
entry.content:
How to public analysis view for all user?
Scenario, I have make 1 User define query in web client. I want all user or some one user can access

entry.title: How can I create a view of a customer's payment history?
entry.content: I need help to create a view in SQL to get all the information about customers' payment history and their debts, including additional information such as the outstanding balance, the date the debt was acquired, and the due date of the debt.

entry.title: SAP B1 in Canada is it possible to turn of AP Invoice Tax rounding
entry.content: We have a client in Canada, using TAX defined as 13%, but when the users enters the actual TAX amount on Vendor Invoice, when we post the invoice the document amount changes when posted due to the system rounding the TAX

entry.title: Query facturación con folio uuid por fecha
entry.content: Saludos, uso SAP business one , y quisiera un query que contenga el número y nombre de cliente, fecha de factura, monto total de la factura el folio fiscal (uuid) de la misma

entry.title: Query pagos recibidos con facturas relacionadas y su monto
entry.content: Saludos, busco un query donde se reflejen los pagos recibidos donde se vea reflejados la o las facturas que comprenda el pago, el monto del mismo, y que salga la forma de pago (efectivo, transferencia, tdc, cheque) y la fecha tanto de contabilización como de Transferencia

entry.title: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content:
One of our users is experiencing an issue where the Item Cost column does not display in the list of items, even though it is already selected in the Form Settings.

We’ve verified that this works fine for other users, so it seems to be isolated to this particular user. We also tried using View > Fit Column Width, but the column still does not appear.

How do we should take to resolve this?

entry.title: sap b1 bas different language settings
entry.content:
Hello,

Today we have an issue with bas access. The language settings stablished for the company is "Spanish (Spain)" and it is ok when you access by desktop client. When you access by bas the language change to "English (United States)".

Anybody knows why is this change and how to fix it?

Kind regards,

Esti.

entry.title: User login take long time
entry.content:
Dears,

Professional users  take long time during login ( About 7 Minutes) 

But limited users don't take long time ( about 30 seconds only )

SAP Business One, Version for HANA

Please, advise

Many thanks

entry.title: Unable to login to SAP Business One due database connectivity issue
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am trying to launch SAP Business One in debug mode (x64) by running visual studio but getting this error -

Connection to the database is lost;contact your system administrator(ODBC-1102) [Message 131-183]

entry.title: B1i Error OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space (failed to allocate 206995144 bytes) (max heap: 4096 MB)
entry.content:
Hello, 
since a few days we have a problem/Technical Error in B1i (Version 1.22.39)

Message:
com.sap.b1i.xcellerator.XcelleratorException:
XCE001 Nested exception: com.sap.b1i.bizprocessor.BizProcException:
BPE001 Nested exception: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError:
Java heap space (failed to allocate 206.995.144 bytes) (max heap: 4096 MB)

I can't understand the Error... 206 MB <> 4096 MB ???
Do you need more details about our system for possible solutions?

Thank you for your help

Greetings
Markus

entry.title: Add BOM Lines and Route Stage with Bill of Materials Management
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to add a route and a resource for all items that have a Bill of Materials (BOM). I can add the resource from the Bill of Materials management document, but I cannot add it together with the route. Is it possible to add both the route and the desired resource under it directly from the Bill of Materials management document?

Thanks,

Regard

entry.title: Unit Price doesn't appear in BOM when I change UoM Group in Item master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created a new UoM Group "Coil" with inside different lenghts of coil in centimeter

After, I created a new item B2.680.35.07 with this new UoM Group ,then I created new PO with this item, then I closed the order with a Invoice (in order to load the price unit in SAP price list) IMAGE 1

 

When I open my BOM with inside this item, doesn't appear the unit price so I don't know cost of BOM (IMAGE 2)

Please note that appear price unit of only items with SAP default UoM Group (not price unit of item with new UoM group)

What's happen? Someone can help me to solve this matter?

entry.title: Query of Closing Stock as per GL Account
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I want a Closing Stock with respect to Closing Stock G/L account with period selection. Data require as per follows :

G/L Acct/BP CodeG/L acct NameLocal Currency - O.B.Local Currency - DebitLocal Currency - CreditLocal Currency - Accu.DebitLocal Currency - Accu.CreditLocal Currency - Balance

entry.title: Avatax Rates by Address in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Is anyone using the native SAP Business One Avatax Rates by Address integration problem free and able to use it through the DIAPI?

We are getting intermittent 'Cannot connect to the Electronic Document Service' errors when using it through the SAP Client and no consistent failures when adding or updating records through the DIAPI.

It falls into the support gap between SAP and Avalara and our SAP Dev Partner has reached the end of his tether trying to diagnose/isolate exactly where/why it fails.

As an aside - it is unable to cope with the full 9 digit USA zip code - it only supports the first 5 characters, but is not smart enough to trim along zip code.

If anyone has this problem or has crossed this bridge, please let get in touch?

grant@delecuona.com

entry.title: SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down
entry.content:
Hi All,

While installing SBO 2411, SQL Server 2022 not available in drop down :

 

Any suggestions on what needs to be done?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: How to add new filter definition in B1if 1.0
entry.content:
Hi,

Anyone knows where to define these filter field in B1if 1.0? And how to add new rows in this setup wizard?

Thanks!
